Lich Castellan Wizard.name: 巫妖城主法师 Lich Castellan Wizard
Lich Castellan Wizard.description:
生命值 556; 重伤 278 ; see also indestructible, second wind
Regeneration 15 (if the lich takes radiant 伤害, regeneration doesn"t function on its next turn)
抗性 15 necrotic 免疫 disease, poison 		先攻 +21 | 行动点 1 | 豁免 +2
AC 44Fort 42Ref 43Will 41 ; see also second wind
速度 8
属性力量 21 (+20)
体质 30 (+25)		敏捷 22 (+21)
智力 33 (+26)		感知 25 (+22)
魅力 28 (+24)
语言 Abyssal, Common, Draconic, Supernal
阵营 Chaotic Evil
技能 Arcana +31, History +31, Insight +29感官 黑暗视觉
被动 Perception 32 | Insight 39

装备 staff of storms

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Death Touch</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>+34 vs Reflex; 3d8+10 necrotic 伤害, and the target is immobilized （豁免终止）. </p>]] (⚔) 死亡之触 Death Death Touch (standard, at-will) ✦ Necrotic

随意 ✦ 黯蚀 [[/roll 3d8+10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Death Touch</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>+34 vs Reflex; 3d8+10 necrotic 伤害, and the target is immobilized （豁免终止）. </p>]]

标准动作 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Lightning Bolt</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Lightning</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +34 vs Reflex; 3d8+10 lightning 伤害, and the target slides 3 squares and is dazed （豁免终止）. </p>]]

+34 vs 反射；3d8+10黯蚀伤害，且目标定身（豁免终止）。 [[/roll 3d8+10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Lightning Bolt</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Lightning</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +34 vs Reflex; 3d8+10 lightning 伤害, and the target slides 3 squares and is dazed （豁免终止）. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Orb of Shadow</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +34 vs Fortitude; 3d10+6 necrotic 伤害, and the target slides 3 squares and is blinded （豁免终止）. </p>]]

[[/roll 3d10+6#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Orb of Shadow</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Necrotic</b></p><p>Ranged 20; +34 vs Fortitude; 3d10+6 necrotic 伤害, and the target slides 3 squares and is blinded （豁免终止）. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Shadow Storm</b> (standard, at-will) ✦ <b>Lightning, Necrotic</b></p><p>The lich makes lightning bolt and orb of shadow attacks against two different targets</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">✻ <b>Lightning Storm</b> (standard; sustain minor, recharge ⚄⚅) ✦ <b>Lightning, Necrotic, Zone</b></p><p>Area burst 2 within 20; +32 vs Fortitude; 3d8+10 lightning and necrotic 伤害. The burst creates a zone that lasts until the end of the lich’s next turn. The zone is considered difficult terrain. Any 生物 that starts its turn within the zone takes 20 lightning and necrotic 伤害. The lich can sustain or dismiss the zone as a minor action. </p>]]

[[/roll 3d8+10#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">✻ <b>Lightning Storm</b> (standard; sustain minor, recharge ⚄⚅) ✦ <b>Lightning, Necrotic, Zone</b></p><p>Area burst 2 within 20; +32 vs Fortitude; 3d8+10 lightning and necrotic 伤害. The burst creates a zone that lasts until the end of the lich’s next turn. The zone is considered difficult terrain. Any 生物 that starts its turn within the zone takes 20 lightning and necrotic 伤害. The lich can sustain or dismiss the zone as a minor action. </p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Second Wind</b> (standard; encounter) ✦ <b>Healing</b></p><p>The lich spends a healing surge and regains 139 hit points. The lich gains a +2 bonus to all defenses until the start of its next turn.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Gaze of Command</b> (minor, recharge ⚄⚅) ✦ <b>Gaze, Psychic</b></p><p>Ranged 5; +34 vs Will; 5d10+9 psychic 伤害 and the target is dominated （豁免终止）. </p>]] ➶ 命令凝视 Gaze of Gaze of Command (minor, recharge ⚄⚅) ✦ Gaze, Psychic

次要动作，充能 [[/roll 5d10+9#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">➶ <b>Gaze of Command</b> (minor, recharge ⚄⚅) ✦ <b>Gaze, Psychic</b></p><p>Ranged 5; +34 vs Will; 5d10+9 psychic 伤害 and the target is dominated （豁免终止）. </p>]]

远程 5 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Lich"s Disdain</b> (minor, at-will) ✦ <b>Psychic, Teleportation</b></p><p>Ranged 5; +34 vs Reflex; 2d8+10 psychic 伤害, and the target is teleported 20 feet above any unoccupied space within 20 squares. A 生物 that falls takes 2d10 伤害. </p>]]

+34 vs 意志；5d10+9心灵伤害，且目标被支配（豁免终止）。 [[/roll 2d8+10#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Lich"s Disdain</b> (minor, at-will) ✦ <b>Psychic, Teleportation</b></p><p>Ranged 5; +34 vs Reflex; 2d8+10 psychic 伤害, and the target is teleported 20 feet above any unoccupied space within 20 squares. A 生物 that falls takes 2d10 伤害. </p>]]

[[/roll 2d10 #<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">➶ <b>Lich"s Disdain</b> (minor, at-will) ✦ <b>Psychic, Teleportation</b></p><p>Ranged 5; +34 vs Reflex; 2d8+10 psychic 伤害, and the target is teleported 20 feet above any unoccupied space within 20 squares. A 生物 that falls takes 2d10 伤害. </p>]]

-

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Indestructible</b></p><p>When the lich is reduced to 0 hit points, its body and possessions crumble into dust, but the lich is not destroyed. It reappears (along with its possessions) in 1d10 days within 1 square of its phylactery, unless the phylactery is also found and destroyed. (The lich’s phylactery is hidden in a secret temple in Everlost.)</p>]] 不可摧毁 Indestructible

当巫妖生命值降至0时，其身体和物品化为尘土，但巫妖并未被摧毁。它在1d10天后在其命匣1格内重新出现（连同其物品），除非命匣也被找到并摧毁。（巫妖的命匣隐藏在永失之地的秘密神殿中。） [[/roll 1d10 #<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Indestructible</b></p><p>When the lich is reduced to 0 hit points, its body and possessions crumble into dust, but the lich is not destroyed. It reappears (along with its possessions) in 1d10 days within 1 square of its phylactery, unless the phylactery is also found and destroyed. (The lich’s phylactery is hidden in a secret temple in Everlost.)</p>]]

自由动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Staff of Storms</b> (free; encounter) </p><p>After making an attack that deals lightning 伤害, the lich deals 3d8 + 10 lightning and thunder 伤害 to every 生物 in a close blast 3.</p>]] 风暴法杖 Staff of Staff of Storms (free; encounter)

自由动作 [[/roll 3d8 + 10#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Staff of Storms</b> (free; encounter) </p><p>After making an attack that deals lightning 伤害, the lich deals 3d8 + 10 lightning and thunder 伤害 to every 生物 in a close blast 3.</p>]]

在做出造成闪电伤害的攻击后，巫妖对近程爆发3内的每个生物造成3d8+10闪电和雷鸣伤害。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

Regeneration 15.name: 再生15 Regeneration 15
Regeneration 15.description:
再生15 Regeneration 15

特性

如果巫妖受到光耀伤害，则其下一回合再生不生效。

Death Touch.description:
死亡之触 Death Touch

基本攻击

随意 ✦ 黯蚀

标准动作

+34 vs 反射；3d8+10黯蚀伤害，且目标定身（豁免终止）。

Orb of Shadow.description:
暗影球 Orb of Shadow

Shadow Storm.name: 暗影风暴 Shadow Storm
Shadow Storm.description:
暗影风暴 Shadow Storm

随意 ✦ 闪电，黯蚀

标准动作

巫妖对两个不同目标分别进行闪电束和暗影球攻击。

Gaze of Command.description:
命令凝视 Gaze of Command

次要动作，充能

远程 5

+34 vs 意志；5d10+9心灵伤害，且目标被支配（豁免终止）。

Lich's Disdain.name: 巫妖之蔑视 Lich's Disdain
Lich's Disdain.description:
巫妖之蔑视 Lich's Disdain

随意 ✦ 心灵，传送

次要动作，随意

远程 5

+34 vs 反射；2d8+10心灵伤害，且目标被传送到20格内任意未被占据空间上方20英尺处。坠落的生物受到2d10伤害。

Lightning Storm.name: 闪电风暴 Lightning Storm
Lightning Storm.description:
闪电风暴 Lightning Storm

充能 5-6 ✦ 闪电，黯蚀，区域

标准动作

范围 爆发2 内20

维持次要

+32 vs 强韧；3d8+10闪电和黯蚀伤害。爆发区域创造一片区域，持续到巫妖下一回合结束。区域视为困难地形。任何在区域内开始其回合的生物受到20点闪电和黯蚀伤害。巫妖可以以一个次要动作维持或解除该区域。

Indestructible.name: 不可摧毁 Indestructible
Indestructible.description:
不可摧毁 Indestructible

特性

当巫妖生命值降至0时，其身体和物品化为尘土，但巫妖并未被摧毁。它在1d10天后在其命匣1格内重新出现（连同其物品），除非命匣也被找到并摧毁。（巫妖的命匣隐藏在永失之地的秘密神殿中。）

Second Wind.name: 第二风 Second Wind
Second Wind.description:
第二风 Second Wind

遭遇 ✦ 医疗

标准动作

巫妖消耗一个医疗回复力，恢复139点生命值。巫妖在所有防御上获得+2加值，直到其下一回合开始。

Staff of Storms.name: 风暴法杖 Staff of Storms
Staff of Storms.description:
风暴法杖 Staff of Storms

遭遇

自由动作

在做出造成闪电伤害的攻击后，巫妖对近程爆发3内的每个生物造成3d8+10闪电和雷鸣伤害。
